message.content:
@startuml
participant "browser" as B
participant "proxy" as P
participant "backend" as BC
participant "component_config" as CC
participant "subscription_map" as SM
participant "normalized_object_map" as NOM
participant "normalized_object" as NO

B --> P : get_state(configuration_name, geo_bounding_box)

P --> BC : +TENANT_HEADER

BC --> CC : component_config[configuration_name].subscription_usages

CC -.-> P : [subscription_usage_config]

P --> SM : foreach subscription_usage_config.subscription_id

SM --> BC : subscription_map[subscription_id] (= normalized_object_map)

SM --> NOM : foreach key

NOM --> SM : normalized_object

SM --> BC : foreach normalized_object:
    if object.in(geo_bounding_box):
        object.to_dto(subscription_usage_config)

BC --> NO : object_dto

P -.-> B : [object_dto]

B --> P : 12

@enduml
